hero.title:
Turn Ocean Plastic
Into Digital Value
hero.subtitle: EcoDive rewards divers and beach cleaners with ECOD tokens. Every kilogram of verified plastic becomes a PLASTIC RWA credit on Base L2.

tokenomics.title: Dual-Token Model
tokenomics.subtitle: Two tokens with distinct roles — governance and real-world asset credit.

ecod.name: ECOD
ecod.description: ERC-20 with 3% DEX tax (1% treasury, 1% liquidity, 1% dev). Used for Sub-DAO voting, staking rewards, and event sponsorship.

plastic.name: PLASTIC
plastic.description: 1 token = 1 kg of verified removed plastic. Minted after AI + buddy-dive verification. Burned with ESG certificate for corporate offsetting.

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: Building the Clean-to-Earn ecosystem — step by step.

phases.title: Foundation
items: ECOD & PLASTIC smart contracts deployed on Base Sepolia
Treasury, Signer, Vesting contracts — 85 tests, 100% coverage

phases.title: dApp & Whitepaper
items: Claim dApp — connect wallet, view balances

phases.title: Backend & Mobile
items: AI verification pipeline (YOLOv8 Edge + GPT-4o Vision)

phases.title: Mainnet & Sub-DAOs
items: Mainnet deployment on Base (external audit first)
Sub-DAO launch: Baltic, Mediterranean, Lakes PL
B2B ESG dashboard for corporate clients

items.question: What is Clean-to-Earn?
items.answer: Clean-to-Earn is our core model: participants who remove plastic from the ocean or beaches are rewarded with ECOD tokens. Divers earn 5–10x more than beach cleaners due to the higher difficulty and impact of underwater cleanup.

items.question: How is cleanup verified?
items.answer: Every cleanup goes through multi-layer verification: GPS + timestamp proof, AI photo analysis (YOLOv8 + GPT-4o Vision), and Buddy-Dive dual-signature (two divers confirm each other's cleanup). This makes gaming the system practically impossible.

items.question: What is the PLASTIC token?
items.answer: PLASTIC is a Real-World Asset (RWA) credit token. 1 PLASTIC = 1 kg of verified removed plastic, recorded on Base L2. Corporate clients can purchase and burn PLASTIC tokens to receive an on-chain ESG certificate for carbon/plastic offsetting.

items.question: Why Base L2?
items.answer: Base (Coinbase L2) offers near-zero transaction fees, EVM compatibility, and growing institutional adoption. It's the most practical choice for a mass-participation environmental protocol where thousands of small reward transactions happen daily.

items.question: When is mainnet launch?
items.answer: We are currently on Base Sepolia testnet (Phase 0). Mainnet launch is planned for Q1 2027 after an external security audit. Join our newsletter to get notified.

items.question: Is the code open-source?
items.answer: Yes. Smart contracts, the dApp, and the TypeScript SDK are fully open-source on GitHub under the MIT license. The backend AI pipeline and mobile app remain private to protect our proprietary verification IP.

newsletter.title: Stay in the Loop
newsletter.subtitle: Get notified about testnet events, TGE date, and Sub-DAO launches.
newsletter.successText: We'll reach out when it matters.

footer.tagline: Cleaning oceans, one token at a time.

dapp.dashboardSubtitle: Connect your wallet to view your ECOD and PLASTIC balances. This is a testnet preview — no real value, no transactions, no token sale.

balances.title: Token Balances
balances.disclaimer: Read-only data from Base Sepolia testnet. No transactions are sent.

claim.title: Claim Rewards
claim.description: Daily Merkle-proof claim of ECOD earned from verified cleanups. Backend integration in Phase 2.

burn.title: Corporate Burn
burn.description: Burn PLASTIC credits with on-chain ESG certificate for CSRD reporting. B2B-only.

governance.title: Governance
governance.description: Vote on Sub-DAO proposals (Baltic, Mediterranean, Lakes PL). Off-chain Snapshot integration first.
